title: ModelOK Property
description: Returns the status of an object's model.
notes: If the model has been taught, ModelOK will return true.  You can ensure that the sequence will run before running a sequence.
see_also:
Runtime only

Applies To

Vision Objects: ColorMatch, Correlation, DefectFinder, Geometric, OCR, Polar
